problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Magnetohydrodynamic. Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
